reasoning: With only 52 days left in 2025 (from the November 9 knowledge cutoff) and no public rumors of a sale or revival since its March 2025 shutdown, a return of the 538 brand is highly unlikely within this short timeframe. Disney rarely acts quickly to sell defunct IP, and the brand's value was significantly diminished after Nate Silver departed with the core election models. Corporate acquisitions or brand revivals typically take months to negotiate and leak beforehand; the total absence of such signals makes a YES resolution by December 31, 2025, extremely improbable.
